title: RemediationTask
description: Turns a gap (failed Control Test / missing Evidence / stale-freshness alert / exception expiring / change-event re-assess) into an owned engineering/compliance work item with a due date, assignee, and verification check. The bridge from 'audit found a gap' to 'work is happening to close it'.

description.description: What needs to be done + why. Markdown allowed.

trigger_ref.description: Identifier of the triggering artefact (control test id, evidence id, exception id, change event id, etc.). Free-form so consumers can dereference however the trigger_kind requires.

assignee_role.description: Role responsible for completion. Matches the Cerbos snake_case role convention.

due_at.description: Hard deadline. Past-due tasks block the next audit pack.

wont_fix_rationale.description: Required when status=wont-fix. Documents the decision + the compensating control + the exception_id if applicable.

compensating_controls.description: If completion is non-feasible by due_at, list the compensating controls in place. References to Exception/Waiver records belong on the exception, not here.

verification_check.description: How completion is verified — typically a Control Test id (TEST-...) that must pass after closure.

evidence_emitted_ids.description: Evidence objects created by this remediation, for the audit-pack trail.

completed_at.description: Required when status=done. The verification_check must have passed at or after this timestamp.
